page_title: Attack on Titan: The Anime Guide
text:
is the official guidebook for the Attack on Titan anime, written by Hajime Isayama and illustrated by Suzuhito Yasuda.

On May 21, 2016, announced their licensing of the guidebook. It was released in April 2017.

Table of contents

Introduction
Character Design References
Interview: Chief Animation Directors and Titan Designer
Kyoji Asano / Satoshi Kadowaki / Takaaki Chiba
Omni-Directional Mobility Gear Diagram
Interview: Action Animation Directors
Yasuyuki Ebara / Arifumi Imai / Yuko Sera
Titan Design References
World Design References
A Look Back on Attack on Titans World Domination
Interview: Series Structure
Yasuko Kobayashi
Currently Publicly Available Information: A Collection!
Interview: Cast
/ / / 
Interview: Musical Artists
Revo, Linked Horizon
Interview: Musical Artists
Yoko Hikasa
Interview: Musical Artists
cinemastaff
Extra-Long Interview! Director / Manga Creator Hajime Isayama
